reviews.review_description: Worth playing I can't get enough....even though knowing there is no finish line I still run like there is. The adrenaline rush when you look back at the creature chasing you is for real. My family and I love it so much. Can't get enough
It's a good game and I like it but the steering and controls are hard
It is good quality and seems ligit, just too glitchy, could have been way better.
John.falco.16, can you just shut up you snobby game  nerd

I like this game for the most part except the controls. Instead of swiping on the touch pad you should just be able to press which direction you want to go. I've died more than a few times because the swipe senses the wrong way.
looks awesome but couldnt get past first jump the controller does not respond to any attempt to get it to jump at all

reviews.review_title: Could be a 5 star game but
reviews.review_description: Needs better gear vr controller support. Swipe works, but only some of the time, rendering the game nearly unplayable. Also needs the ability to buy things with collected coins. That would not only extend the games playability but would allow the developers to monetize the game by selling coins in game.
It was great but needs goals.
Good and it's free so even better
It won’t let me move at all I tried everything but it was free so

This game has been through my childhood all the way and I'm so glad it's been brought to vr, the only sad thing is how pointless you feel playing because the coins mean nothing and it just gets repetitive if there's nothing in between games like the store
Liked app on phone. This is way better. Whole family loves it

So it was fun kinda chill not lots of action witch is good if a young player is playing but mobile was more realistic and when I said it was for young players it wasn’t very good when you die when you die it shows jaws and I thought it was a little creepy so if young people want to play they should be aware

The gameplay is good, but some basic functions are missing - a leaderboard/top scores, more obstacles, or anything to do with the collected coins. 
Sometimes has problems registering swipes on the Go controller.

This game made me so motion sick I had to lay down for an hour after I played it for not even 15-20 seconds and I still feel extremely dizzy... I wish I was lying... As soon as I started running I couldn't even stand up I was swaying back and forth, falling over, felt like i was floating away??and like I was going to puke. This is insane because the graphics aren't even good lol I say 5 star for almost making me puke. I'll never play temple run vr again. I came into this thinking this vr wasn't going to be that great and I got owned.
This is a really great game and I play it on my iPad, you can run jump ant turn and you’ll have to get away from the whatever the heck they are chasing you.
This game is a no! No! On the Oculus Go! Won’t work at all!!!
